name: kumbhrakshak-setu
description: Offline-first cross-center missing-person matcher for Nashik Kumbh Mela 2027. Zero-dependency rules engine + phased Claude prompt.

scripts.demo: node engine/cli.js --gender Male --age 72 --state Bihar --loc "Ramkund Ghat" --desc "elderly man, white kurta, rudraksha mala" --semantic heuristic
